feat.name: Sunbird Glare
feat.text: By keeping your feathers clean and sleek, you can catch the light across your wings to create a startling glare in the eyes of a creature within 20 feet. The target must succeed at a Fortitude save against your class DC or be dazzled for 1 round (1 minute on a critical failure). Regardless of their result, the target is temporarily immune to Sunbird Glare for 10 minutes.

traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
